title: 10 best herbal essential oils for oily hair
description: Pelargonium graveolens, also known as geranium, essential oils helps with oily hair because of its balancing and regulating properties. The oil is rich in geraniol, which helps to control the production of sebum, thereby reducing oiliness and greasiness. It also has antiseptic and astringent properties that help to tighten the pores and prevent dirt and oil from accumulating. As a result, geranium essential oil can help to keep the scalp clean and the hair looking healthy and balanced....
